assets.caption: Config view showing only credential references, not secrets

scenario.title: Enforce references-not-secrets in synced config
steps: Open the app with mock environments
Verify no secret values appear in the UI
Verify localStorage config contains only references
Verify credential prompts use references not key material

assertions.description: The mock config service does not expose secret values in the UI
Environment entries in localStorage store only references, not credentials
The credential re-auth prompt uses references not key material

prMarkdown:
## Visual Evidence
### Enforce references-not-secrets in synced config

![Config view showing only credential references, not secrets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CKGrafico/orbion/5a97847a79d4c57deb7b2f3f7cb407f27e68a358/openspec/changes/gh-162-references-not-secrets/evidence/01-config-references.webp)

<details>
<summary>Automated validation scenario</summary>

1. Open the app with mock environments
2. Verify no secret values appear in the UI
3. Verify localStorage config contains only references
4. Verify credential prompts use references not key material

</details>
